name: Fillet of Sole Over Celery
recipeIngredient: 2 center stalks of celery, sliced, leaves left whole
1 tablespoon poultom gold or fish stock (clam juice)
1 teaspoon green peppercorns in brine, drained
6 ounce fillet of sole, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sliced celery, broth, butter, peppercorns, and salt on a dinner plate. Cover with microwave plastic wrap. Cook at full power for 2 minutes.
2. Remove from oven. Uncover and scatter celery leaves over mixture. Place fish evenly spaced on top of celery. Sprinkle with lemon juice and celery seeds. Cover tightly with plastic wrap. Cook at full power for 1 minute (if using a small oven, cook for 2 minutes).
3. To Serve: Double the ingredients. Divide ingredients equally between two plates. Proceed as for single serving, heating broth mixture simultaneously using a rack for 4 minutes. Cook fish as in step 2 for 2 minutes.
